Telecommunication equipment
Antenna 5700 2L 4M 2.0m
Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ4(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m
Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ5(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m
goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate corresponds exactly with item descriptions in invoice lines. Article numbers in certificate match exactly invoice part numbers, enabling identification by article number as primary method. The main product identifiers match without interpretation. The quantity and descriptions match.

quantity.motivation: Quantity of '37 PACKAGES' (cert.) matches '37 BOXES' in invoice (accepted package synonym). Gross weight '4972,910 KG' appears as '4.972,910 KG' in invoice with allowed thousand separator normalization. Both numeric and unit values correspond, no contradictions. Verification according to rule 4.4.3.2 and 4.4.4 applies.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin country is 'CN' (China). Invoice explicitly lists 'CN' as origin for all goods. Normalization rules including China/Hong Kong equivalence applied. No conflicting origin information found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points - consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin - verified as matching without contradictions or uncertainty.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer utan avvikelser. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
